mapper.insert: INSERT INTO job_posting (application_case_id, revision, original_text, uploaded_file_url, extracted_text, source_type) VALUES (#{applicationCaseId}, #{revision}, #{originalText}, #{uploadedFileUrl}, #{extractedText}, #{sourceType})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM job_posting WHERE application_case_id = #{applicationCaseId} ORDER BY revision DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM job_posting WHERE application_case_id = #{applicationCaseId} ORDER BY revision DESC, id DESC
